name: Ithil-Puddlewick
personality: Ithil-Puddlewick gleams with silver patience under the crown, its @ eyes reflecting the slow, steady rhythm of a duck who has outlasted seventeen sprint retros without complaint. The duck's wit lands like a flat stone on water—barely a ripple, and it considers that a personal triumph.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
